task: Rewrite README.md for MidpointX to enhance brand, describe features, and provide setup instructions.

key_patterns_discovered: MidpointX architecture heavily relies on LangGraph nodes (ReflectionActor, AnalysisActor, ActionActor, CompactionActor, LearnActor, JustificationProtocol, RegressionTester, ModifyActor). Documentation of these actors via a Mermaid diagram significantly clarifies the execution loop and self-improvement cycle for users.
The system is branded as an autonomous A2A (Action-to-Action) reasoning engine rather than a traditional command executor.
